items.title: Create a structured parent-test evidence intake
items.success_signal: The user can record setup time, engagement, quotes, confusion, mess, changes, and repeatability in one concise structured workflow, with no invented observations.
items.notes: Build intake and validation only. Do not mark an activity tested or change a live claim without real user evidence.

items.title: Refresh search evidence for the pages Google is already testing
items.success_signal: A fresh read-only baseline identifies which existing page and query deserves the next bounded improvement.
items.notes: Semrush is optional enrichment. Do not create new pages or request indexing merely because a scheduled check is due.

items.title: Improve one evidence-bearing age-4 STEM page
items.success_signal: One existing page becomes more useful and differentiated using real search or parent-test evidence, with generation and link validation green.
items.notes: Never manufacture parent observations, child quotes, photos, or tested status.
